name: Sweet and Sour Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: Non-nutritive sweetener; equivalent to 2 tbsp sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil water, cider vinegar, non-nutritive sweetener (or 2 tablespoons sugar), pickle pieces, and salt in a saucepan.
2. Place cucumber slices and celery slices in a glass jar.
3. Pour the boiling liquid over the vegetables in the jar.
4. Cover the jar tightly and refrigerate for at least overnight.
5. Drain any excess liquid before serving.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
